name: niuma-notifier
description: A local desktop notifier for AI coding tool status and blocking requests.

scripts.build:plugins: npm run build:codex-plugin && npm run build:bark-plugin && npm run build:ntfy-plugin && node scripts/sync-plugin-resources.mjs debug
scripts.build:plugins:release: npm run build:codex-plugin:release && npm run build:bark-plugin:release && npm run build:ntfy-plugin:release && node scripts/sync-plugin-resources.mjs release
scripts.test: npm run test:main-dashboard-layout && npm run test:dashboard-auto-return && npm run test:responsive-layout-css && npm run test:status-summary && npm run test:listener-toggle && npm run test:settings-view && npm run test:remote-settings-view && npm run test:plugin-transition && npm run test:plugin-runtime-refresh && npm run test:plugin-snapshot && npm run test:notification-settings-layout && npm run test:notification-history && npm run test:event-center && npm run test:event-center-window && npm run test:event-center-runtime
scripts.test:main-dashboard-layout: tsc --target ES2022 --module commonjs --moduleResolution node --lib ES2022,DOM --skipLibCheck --strict --esModuleInterop --outDir /tmp/niuma-main-dashboard-test tests/mainDashboardLayout.test.ts && node /tmp/niuma-main-dashboard-test/tests/mainDashboardLayout.test.js
scripts.test:dashboard-auto-return: tsc --target ES2022 --module commonjs --moduleResolution node --lib ES2022,DOM --skipLibCheck --strict --esModuleInterop --outDir /tmp/niuma-dashboard-auto-return-test tests/dashboardAutoReturn.test.ts && node /tmp/niuma-dashboard-auto-return-test/tests/dashboardAutoReturn.test.js
scripts.test:responsive-layout-css: tsc --target ES2022 --module commonjs --moduleResolution node --lib ES2022,DOM --skipLibCheck --strict --esModuleInterop --outDir /tmp/niuma-responsive-layout-test tests/responsiveLayoutCss.test.ts && node /tmp/niuma-responsive-layout-test/responsiveLayoutCss.test.js
scripts.test:status-summary: tsc --target ES2022 --module commonjs --moduleResolution node --lib ES2022,DOM --skipLibCheck --strict --esModuleInterop --outDir /tmp/niuma-status-summary-test tests/statusSummaryRender.test.ts && node /tmp/niuma-status-summary-test/tests/statusSummaryRender.test.js
scripts.test:listener-toggle: tsc --target ES2022 --module commonjs --moduleResolution node --lib ES2022,DOM --skipLibCheck --strict --esModuleInterop --outDir /tmp/niuma-listener-toggle-test tests/listenerToggleRender.test.ts && node /tmp/niuma-listener-toggle-test/tests/listenerToggleRender.test.js
scripts.test:settings-view: tsc --target ES2022 --module commonjs --moduleResolution node --lib ES2022,DOM --skipLibCheck --strict --esModuleInterop --outDir /tmp/niuma-settings-view-test tests/settingsViewRender.test.ts && node /tmp/niuma-settings-view-test/tests/settingsViewRender.test.js

scripts.test:plugin-transition: tsc --target ES2022 --module commonjs --moduleResolution node --lib ES2022,DOM --skipLibCheck --strict --esModuleInterop --outDir /tmp/niuma-plugin-transition-test tests/pluginTransition.test.ts && node /tmp/niuma-plugin-transition-test/tests/pluginTransition.test.js
scripts.test:plugin-runtime-refresh: tsc --target ES2022 --module commonjs --moduleResolution node --lib ES2022,DOM --skipLibCheck --strict --esModuleInterop --outDir /tmp/niuma-plugin-runtime-refresh-test tests/pluginRuntimeRefresh.test.ts && node /tmp/niuma-plugin-runtime-refresh-test/tests/pluginRuntimeRefresh.test.js
